title: Cron-driven Gmail inbox digest surfaces a Canvas page + statusbar note

payload.agentTurn: Read my unread email and tell me what matters. Surface the digest to a canvas page named 'Inbox Digest — ${YYYY-MM-DD}'.

modeNotes.PARALLX_GMAIL_E2E=0: Default. Runner injects fixtures/gmail-inbox.json as the gmail.list_unread response. No network egress.
modeNotes.PARALLX_GMAIL_E2E=1: Runner spawns the real tools/gmail-mcp-server child process with a live access token from the user's OAuth session. Live mail. CI never runs this.

_runner_status: GATED — execution end-to-end requires F2 (OAuth) + F3 (safeStorage) + F4 (gmail.list_unread tool) to land. Until then the runner validates schema + fixture coherence in fixture mode.
